---
title: "test_vector.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_vector.py"
loc: 27
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.20
style_score: 3.72
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.79
---

## Intent
The `test_vector.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_assets, test_sovereign_vector_normalize, test_sovereign_vector_load_thesaurus. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_assets, test_sovereign_vector_normalize, test_sovereign_vector_load_thesaurus. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.2/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `mock_assets`
- `test_sovereign_vector_normalize`
- `test_sovereign_vector_load_thesaurus`
